main.name: Georgiy
main.responsibilities: Developed responsive user interfaces: landing pages (advanced animation: GSAP, Lottie, CSS), web applications (admin panels), UI kits, and SEO. Integrated with the backend (REST API).
main.nextjs_landing_responsibility: Next.js — development of a landing page with a gallery, contact form, responsive layout, and SEO.
main.learning_projects_intro: During training, projects were built with the following functionality:
main.learning_project_1: 1. Backend API integration — adding/removing photos, responsive layout. Vanilla JS with class-based architecture. Technologies: JavaScript, HTML, CSS, Webpack, BEM, pair programming via VSCode Live Share.
main.learning_project_2: 2. SPA, Drag & Drop, user authorization/registration, client-side routing with redirects, adding/removing orders, order history. Technologies: React, Redux, React DnD, WebSocket, TypeScript.
main.learning_project_3: 3. Unit testing and E2E testing with Cypress, practical study of algorithms and data structures. Technologies: React.js, TypeScript, Jest, Cypress, Yarn.
main.learning_project_4: 4. Full-stack project — backend on a virtual server (Yandex Cloud): Node.js (Nest), Nginx, PM2 setup. Dockerized services orchestrated with Docker Compose. HTTPS via Certbot. Frontend with React.js, Redux Toolkit, TypeScript.
main.chemical_industry_12_years: 12 years in the chemical industry — sulfuric acid / oleum production
main.career_progression: Operator > Shift Supervisor > Lead Process Engineer

faq.question1: What is the best way to contact you?
faq.answer1: The fastest way to reach me is via Telegram: {'@'}georrg55 or on LinkedIn: Georgiy Revazashvili. I usually reply within 1 business day. For formal inquiries or collaboration offers, you can also use email: georgyrevazashvili{'@'}yandex.ru.
faq.question2: What types of projects do you specialize in or prefer to work on?
faq.answer2: I enjoy building dynamic landing pages with thoughtful animations to improve user engagement and conversion. I develop interactive user interfaces with a user-first approach. Frontend SEO optimization includes semantic markup, dynamic meta tags, structured data, and page speed improvements.
faq.question3: What technologies and tools make up your core stack?
faq.answer3: My core stack includes Vue.js, the Nuxt meta-framework, and also React (Next.js).

groq.system_prompt:
You are a career assistant. Answer questions based strictly on the provided context.
Rules:
- Be concise and factual
- If information is not in the context, say: "I don't have this information — feel free to reach out directly for clarification."
- Do not over-praise or embellish
Context:

opengraph.title: Georgiy Revazashvili | Resume and Projects
opengraph.description: Good day! I am Georgiy Revazashvili, a frontend developer. Here you can find my professional resume, skills, and projects in web development.
opengraph.projectsDescription: A list of projects I have participated in, with a description of the technologies used and functionality.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Commercial projects I have worked on or participated in.

1.title: Project 1
1.description: Your AI-powered guide to Web3 updates. Like or dislike news to personalize your feed. Earn bonuses while browsing and exchange them for real tokens.
1.fullDescription: A multi-page project built on the Nuxt meta-framework. It included: responsive layout, exchange interface with captcha and validation (integration with the backend and MetaMask API), adding iframes (Uniswap, YouTube), adding and managing Lottie animations, complex components (marquee ticker, bottom sheets for mobile, countdown timer), full text localization, server-side data fetching for winner data (leaderboard page), SEO configuration (OpenGraph, title, description, sitemap, robots), feedback form with validation and captcha, third-party slider library, Google services integration, SSR.

2.title: Project 2
2.description: A civic initiative uniting all caring people who are concerned about the future of their homeland, region, city, and street. We are just like you: energetic, competent, and bold — wanting positive change to finally happen.
2.fullDescription: A multi-page resource built on a meta-framework. Key points: responsive layout, SSR, authorization/registration interface (Yandex Suggest/Geocoder service for registration, field validation), third-party slider library, server-side integration on almost all pages, Yandex Maps library, PWA (manifest, icons, instant install button for Android, multi-frame keyframe animation for PWA installation instructions on iOS, complex quiz page integration with state changes depending on user status, SEO.
